title: Svinopack
description: A pig-themed Crystal PvP resource pack.
body:
A pig-themed Crystal PvP resource pack that changes some items, blocks, HUD elements and sounds.

![An image that showcases most of the textures in Svinopack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20816483b69a96cbb26ec9ea9dbc75acf1edd886.png)

Misc features:
- Lowfire
- Smaller items
- Lower shield
